race.description: Advantage Pharmacy / A Bowling Painter Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: GAVIN (4) is racing well without being able to break through. Was no match for a dominant winner in the slop last time but was well supported that day and held second. In the mix. VENOM WOLF (7) ran midfield last start at Port Macquarie on a soft track. Is up in distance and rates among the each-way hopes. SINATRA (2) grabbed a win at Murwillumbah two runs back before being easily accounted for 28 days ago over 1590m at Ballina. In the mix on best. TARA KODA (14) has been out of the money of late including last time out when fifth over 1600m at this track four days ago. On the quick back up and can feature.

favourite.silk_colours: CERISE, LIME BRACES AND ARMBANDS, BLACK CAP
